name: clauderc
description: Hadis Jalesiyan's personal Claude Code toolkit: a config-driven Jira/scratchpad plugin and a spec-driven-development plugin.

plugins.name: clauderc
plugins.description: A Claude Code toolkit: a research scratchpad browser and a config-driven Jira ticket creator, plus a desktop notification hook. Org/personal values are read from a gitignored ~/.claude/clauderc.private.json.

plugins.name: claude-spec-kit
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow: spec-define + spec-implement skills, spec-reviewer agent, and an optional autonomous TDD loop.
